name: Tobias Barreto
description: Tobias Barreto foi jurista, filósofo, poeta e intelectual ligado à chamada Escola do Recife. Sua conexão com o Teatro Santa Isabel aproxima pensamento jurídico, literatura e vida cultural pernambucana do século XIX.
de: Tobias Barreto was a jurist, philosopher, poet and intellectual linked to the so-called Escola do Recife. His connection with the Teatro Santa Isabel brings together legal thought, literature and 19th-century Pernambuco cultural life.
